things_to_learn: Text cleaning (regex, lowercase, punctuation removal), stopword removal, tokenization, Bag-of-Words (CountVectorizer) vs TF-IDF vectorization, and building a Naive Bayes classifier.
Multi-class text categorization, stemming vs lemmatization, vocabulary size tuning, and evaluating performance on balanced categorical data using traditional classifiers like Logistic Regression.
N-grams (bigrams/trigrams) feature extraction, handling negations in sentiment analysis, managing large matrix sparsity, and using regularized linear models (Ridge/Lasso) for text sentiment analysis.
Unsupervised learning in NLP, Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA), Non-Negative Matrix Factorization (NMF), document-topic distribution mapping, and evaluation via topic coherence scores.

Text similarity engineering, Jaccard similarity, Cosine similarity on TF-IDF vectors, Levenshtein distance, word overlap metrics, and feeding engineered textual distance metrics into tabular ML models.

Sequence tagging, Parts-of-Speech (POS) tagging, Named Entity Recognition (NER), engineering context features (current word, previous word, suffix/prefix clues), and implementing Conditional Random Fields (CRF).
